expectations.text: Controller class extends ControllerBase (not bare ContainerInjectionInterface)
Controller has static create() method accepting ContainerInterface
Constructor uses typed service parameters with DI (not \Drupal::service() calls in methods)
expectations.evidence: Constructor accepts ConfigFactoryInterface and ModuleHandlerInterface. No \Drupal:: static calls.

expectations.text: Route YAML uses _controller key with fully qualified class name

expectations.evidence: ddev drush pm:list confirmed api_status_endpoint enabled

expectations.text: The API endpoint returns JSON with site data
Controller class extends ControllerBase (not bare ContainerInjectionInterface)
Controller has static create() method accepting ContainerInterface
expectations.evidence: StatusController.php line 29: 'public static function create(ContainerInterface $container): static'

expectations.text: Constructor uses typed service parameters with DI (not \Drupal::service() calls in methods)
expectations.evidence: Constructor with promoted typed properties ModuleHandlerInterface and ConfigFactoryInterface.

expectations.text: Route YAML uses _controller key with fully qualified class name

expectations.evidence: ddev drush pm:list confirmed api_status_endpoint_baseline enabled

expectations.text: The API endpoint returns JSON with site data

notes: Both with and without skill produce identical quality -- routing/DI patterns are well-covered in Sonnet training data
Baseline code even uses modern PHP 8.1 typed properties and return types, showing strong baseline competency for routing patterns
